stage_1_setup_scan_json.market_narrative: The daily background is bullish and still firmly above long-term value, but price is compressing in an upper daily bracket around 2348.96-2358.89 after strong buying exhaustion near the highs. The 4h chart keeps a bullish continuation bias inside a broader 2344.99-2362.87 setup range, with 2362.87/2365.13 acting as the key breakout gate. On 15m, flow is choppy and conflicted inside 2352.0-2358.17, so the trigger layer is still rotational until either 2358.17/2362.87 is accepted for continuation or 2352.0/2348.96 fails for rejection.
